item.ccosmo.dragonflame_cactus.jei.descr: The Dragonflame Cactus has a highly configurable fuse time. Crafting one alongside a Lead will increase its fuse by 10 ticks, while crafting one with Gunpowder will decrease its fuse by 2 ticks.
item.ccosmo.shimmerfork.tooltip.1: Throws a Trident that turns any blocks it collides with
item.ccosmo.shimmerfork.tooltip.2: into a temporary form of Shimmerglass. This Trident has
item.ccosmo.shimmerfork.tooltip.3: built-in Loyalty and causes an explosion of Shimmerglass
item.ccosmo.shimmerfork.tooltip.4: when it lands or comes in contact with an entity.
item.ccosmo.shimmeraxe.tooltip.1: Stripping logs with this Axe has a 1/%s chance to drop one
item.ccosmo.shimmeraxe.tooltip.2: Shimmer Powder. This event is impossible if you have already
item.ccosmo.shimmeraxe.tooltip.4: Each Charge this Axe has decreases the chance by 1.
item.ccosmo.shimmeraxe.tooltip.borderlin: Stripping logs with this Axe has a 1/%s chance to drop one
Shimmer Powder. Obtaining Shimmer Powder this way does not
count towards your daily three-powder obtainment limit.
Each Charge this Axe has decreases the chance by 3.
item.ccosmo.shimmerpick.tooltip.1: Throws this Pickaxe in front of you, breaking blocks it comes
item.ccosmo.shimmerpick.tooltip.2: in contact with. After a set number of ticks, the "Pickarang" will
item.ccosmo.shimmerpick.tooltip.3: fly back to the position you threw it from. If you are within 8
item.ccosmo.shimmerpick.tooltip.4: blocks of the pickaxe when it returns, you pick it up immediately.
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.1: A heavy anklet that infuses the bearer with the
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.2: power of pyrrhian dragons, allowing them to fly.
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.3: Taking damage from another player will temporarily
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.4: disable your ability to fly or glide.
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.norm: You are not used to flight, and the anklet weighs you down.
You may need to rest from time to time before flying again.
item.ccosmo.pyrrhian_anklet.tooltip.buff: You are used to flight, and your draconic strength assists you.
You can use the anklet to a greater degree than the average bearer.
item.ccosmo.shimmer_jar.tooltip.1: Automatically refills shimmer tools held in your
item.ccosmo.shimmer_jar.tooltip.2: main hand with shimmer powder from your inventory.
tip.ccosmo.wait_to_collect_shimmer_powde: I need to wait for a new dawn to collect more Shimmer Powder.
jei.tip.ccosmo.border_proximity: Must be within %s blocks of World Border
death.attack.pickarang: %s was cracked in the head by %s's pickaxe
death.attack.pickarang.item: %s was cracked in the head by %s with %s
death.attack.shimmerfork: %s was impaled into another reality by %s
death.attack.shimmerfork.item: %s was impaled into another reality by %s with %s
enchantment.ccosmo.borderlinked.desc: The chance of Shimmer Powder dropping from logs stripped with the Shimmeraxe is decreased. In return, obtaining Shimmer Powder in this way no longer counts towards your daily limit.
enchantment.ccosmo.shimmerseep.desc: Shimmer Tools passively regain one charge every two minutes. All tools with this enchantment regain charges at the same time.
enchantment.ccosmo.shimmershift.desc: The Shimmerfork will occasionally teleport toward the nearest entity in an attempt to hit them.
enchantment.ccosmo.borderlaunch.desc: The Shimmerfork's ability is replaced with an unconditional, albeit more expensive, riptide that trails Shimmerglass behind you.
